---
title: "Santiago Forero Alvarado"
---

PhD Student in Economics · University of Minnesota  
Research Analyst · Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis

## Research Interests

Monetary Policy · Banking · International Macroeconomics

## Contact

📧 [forer026@umn.edu](mailto:forer026@umn.edu)  
🐙 [GitHub](https://github.com/santiago-foreroalvarado)
